TO ACCEPT PAYMENTS OF $150 OR MORE ON OR BEFORE THE 25TH DAY OF EACH MONTH COMMENCING 8/25/03, AND CONTINUING AT THAT RATE EVERY MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
